final:
module priority_arbiter(
    input [3:0] deny,
    output reg [3:0] grant
);

always @(*) begin
    grant = 4'b0000; // Default: no grants
    if (deny[3]) grant = 4'b1000; // Grant deny[3]
    else if (deny[2]) grant = 4'b0100; // Grant deny[2]
    else if (deny[1]) grant = 4'b0010; // Grant deny[1]
    else if (deny[0]) grant = 4'b0001; // Grant deny[0]
end

endmodule
